one_liner: Brex offers a broad REST API (with an official MCP server) for managing corporate card, expense, and accounting data, secured via self-serve bearer tokens or OAuth2 for partners.

auth_methods.notes: User token (bearer token, prefixed bxt_) generated via Brex dashboard (Settings > Developer) by an account/card admin; passed as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' header. Expires after 90 days of inactivity.
Used for partner integrations via Authorization Code Grant or Client Credentials Grant flows.

self_serve_notes: API access included free in Essentials, Premium, and Enterprise tiers. Any account/card admin can generate a user token directly from the dashboard after accepting the developer API agreement — no sales contact needed for standard token access. Partner OAuth2 flows likely require a partnership agreement.

api_surface.notes: REST APIs covering Team, Accounting, Payments, Expenses, Budgets, Cards, Transactions, etc., documented via OpenAPI specs.

evidence.supports: Bearer token auth via self-serve dashboard token generation; OAuth2 for partners
Self-serve token generation and first API call example
OAuth2 Authorization Code / Client Credentials grant for partner integrations
API access included in free Essentials tier as well as Premium/Enterprise
Broad REST API surface including Accounting API
Broad REST API surface including Team API
